command: virsh --connect qemu:///system start archlinux && virt-manager --connect qemu:///system --show-domain-console archlinux
name: Start arch vm

command: virsh --connect qemu:///system start archlinux2 && virt-manager --connect qemu:///system --show-domain-console archlinux2
name: Start arch vm2

command: virsh --connect qemu:///system start win11 && virt-manager --connect qemu:///system --show-domain-console win11
name: Start windows
